_comment: Declarative live access-point feed registry consumed by access_points.py. One entry per agency layer; a state may declare several (boat ramps + fishing piers). Every `url` was verified against the live endpoint when added (layer metadata + returnCountOnly + a real f=geojson sample). Field options per source: `name_field`, `type_field` (run through the type normalizer) or `fixed_type` (whole layer is one canonical type), `notes_field`, `access` (default 'public'). The loader centroids non-point geometry and degrades to the bundled baseline when an endpoint is unreachable.
